remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Choose target creature or Spacecraft card with mana value 5 or less in your graveyard
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Return target creature or Spacecraft card with mana value 5 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Then create a Lander token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.")
